title: Garage schemas
description: Bike, maintenance logs, tire pressure logs, modifications, and ownership history for the Dialed Garage feature

dateTime.description: An ISO 8601 date-time string with timezone (e.g. 2026-03-18T12:00:00Z)

date.description: A calendar date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP)

Bike.description: A motorcycle in a user's garage. The core entity for all Dialed features — maintenance, tires, mods, sessions, and telemetry all hang off a bike.

user_id.description: ID of the user who owns or manages this bike

make.description: Manufacturer name (e.g. Honda, Ducati, Yamaha, KTM)

model.description: Model designation (e.g. CBR600RR, Panigale V4R, R1M)

vin.description: Vehicle identification number. Optional but useful for service records.

mileage_km.description: Current odometer reading in kilometres. Updated manually by the rider.

engine_hours.description: Current hour meter reading. Used by track bikes that track engine hours instead of mileage.

exhaust.description: Exhaust system description (e.g. Akrapovič full system, stock)

ecu.description: ECU / flash description (e.g. stock, PiggyBack, Woolich Racing flash)

suspension_spec.description: Current suspension settings. Validated JSONB — see suspension-spec.schema.json for the full shape.

notes.description: Free-text notes about the bike (quirks, known issues, build notes)

status.description: Current ownership/availability status. Soft-deleted bikes are excluded from list views.

deleted_at.description: Soft-delete timestamp. Non-null means the bike has been removed from the garage view but data is retained.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this bike was added to the garage

updated_at.description: Timestamp when any bike field was last modified

MaintenanceLog.description: A single maintenance event for a bike — oil change, chain service, valve check, etc. Includes optional next-due reminders.

bike_id.description: ID of the bike this maintenance was performed on

user_id.description: ID of the user who logged this entry

category.description: Type of maintenance performed. Used for filtering and upcoming-service queries.

description.description: What was done in plain text (e.g. 'Full oil and filter change, Motul 7100 10W-40')

mileage_km.description: Odometer reading at time of service in kilometres

engine_hours.description: Hour meter reading at time of service

cost.description: Cost of the service, in the specified currency

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the cost field

performed_by.description: Who performed the service (e.g. 'self', 'Honda Dealer', 'John Smith')

performed_at.description: Calendar date when the maintenance was performed

next_due_km.description: Odometer reading at which the next service of this type is due

next_due_date.description: Calendar date by which the next service should be performed, regardless of mileage

receipt_url.description: URL of a receipt photo stored in blob storage

created_at.description: Timestamp when this log entry was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this log entry was last modified

TirePressureLog.description: A timestamped tire pressure reading. Can be linked to a track session for pre/post-session analysis.

bike_id.description: ID of the bike the reading was taken on

user_id.description: ID of the user who logged this reading

front_psi.description: Front tire pressure in PSI at the time of reading

rear_psi.description: Rear tire pressure in PSI at the time of reading

front_temp_c.description: Front tire surface temperature in Celsius at the time of reading. Primarily useful for track sessions.

rear_temp_c.description: Rear tire surface temperature in Celsius at the time of reading. Primarily useful for track sessions.

context.description: When in the riding lifecycle this reading was taken. Used to group and compare readings meaningfully.

session_id.description: Optional link to a track session. Set for pre_session/post_session/pit_stop readings.

notes.description: Free-text notes (e.g. 'Ambient 18°C, tyres cold from overnight')

recorded_at.description: Timestamp when the pressure reading was taken

created_at.description: Timestamp when this record was created in the database

Modification.description: A part installed, removed, or changed on a bike. Builds a full modification history for insurance, resale, and AI context.

bike_id.description: ID of the bike this modification applies to

user_id.description: ID of the user who logged this modification

action.description: What was done to the part. 'swapped' implies replacing one part with another of the same type.

category.description: System or area of the bike affected. Used for filtering and AI context building.

part_name.description: Descriptive name of the part (e.g. 'Öhlins TTX GP rear shock', 'Brembo M50 calipers')

part_number.description: OEM or aftermarket part number for exact identification

cost.description: Cost of the part or service, in the specified currency

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the cost field

installed_at.description: Calendar date when this part was installed or the action was performed

removed_at.description: Calendar date when this part was removed. Null means the part is currently installed.

mileage_km.description: Odometer reading in kilometres when this modification was made

notes.description: Free-text notes (settings used, reason for swap, supplier info, etc.)

created_at.description: Timestamp when this modification record was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this modification record was last modified

OwnershipHistory.description: A single ownership event for a bike — purchase, sale, trade, gift, or transfer. Builds a provenance timeline.

bike_id.description: ID of the bike involved in this ownership event

user_id.description: ID of the Dialed user recording this event

event_type.description: The nature of the ownership transaction

date.description: Calendar date when the ownership event occurred

price.description: Transaction price, in the specified currency. Null for gifted or non-monetary transfers.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the price field

mileage_km.description: Odometer reading in kilometres at the time of the transaction

counterparty.description: Name of the other party in the transaction (e.g. 'Honda of Seattle', 'Private seller - John D.')

created_at.description: Timestamp when this ownership record was created
